description: Style NoteA perfect addition to your daily wardrobe, this sandal from catwalk is crafted from durable material with fashionable cutouts to offer exemplary comfort without compromising on style.Product DetailsSandal with white synthetic straps on the forefootA strap connecting the forefoot straps to the heel cup with an elasticated band for a snug FitHeel cup to lock the foot in placeSmooth footbed Rubber outsole with branded grooves on the forefoot and an upraised heel with floral groove on the heelMaterial and Care SyntheticWipe with a clean cloth to remove dustDo not store under sunlight
